base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of simon_whip_level_3_color_4 — a character from 1986 castlevania. Morning Star whip color 4 — palette variant. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Morning Star whip color 4 — palette variant; 4 colors cycle in 4-frame metal-flash loop during every strike
